response: Yes, both Broughtonia and Laeliocattleya are orchids. Broughtonia is a genus of orchids native to the Bahamas and the Greater Antilles, and it is abbreviated Bro in trade journals. Laeliocattleya is a nothogenus of intergeneric orchid hybrids descended from the parental genera "Laelia" and "Cattleya," and it is abbreviated Lc in the horticultural trade. Both are part of the Orchidaceae family.
